hero.eyebrow: Real Estate Media · Texas Hill Country
hero.subhead: Magazine-quality photos, aerial coverage, twilight shoots and cinematic video tours for Hill Country agents — delivered MLS-ready, most photos by the next day.

included.title: One shooter. Every angle.
included.intro: No juggling a photographer, a drone pilot and a videographer. One visit covers the ground, the air and the golden hour.

items.title: HDR Listing Photography
items.copy: Bright, true-to-color interiors and exteriors with clear window views — the photos that stop the scroll on Zillow and MLS.

items.title: Aerial Photos & Video
items.copy: Drone coverage that shows the whole story — lot lines, acreage, river frontage and those Hill Country views.

items.title: Twilight Shoots
items.copy: Blue-hour exteriors with warm windows glowing against the dusk sky — the hero shot that makes a listing feel like a destination.

items.title: Cinematic Video Tours
items.copy: Smooth walkthrough films with aerials woven in, graded in our signature cinematic style. Built for the listing page and YouTube.

items.title: Vertical Reels for Social
items.copy: 15–30 second cuts sized for Instagram, TikTok and Facebook — so the listing markets itself while you take calls.

items.title: Fast, MLS-Ready Delivery
items.copy: Photos delivered next day in MLS and print resolution through an easy online gallery. Video within 48–72 hours.

packages.title: Flat rates. No surprises.
packages.intro: Per-listing pricing built for agents. Book one shoot or put us on speed dial for every listing you take.

tiers.name: The Pair
tiers.blurb: The MLS essentials — crisp photos plus aerials that show the whole lot.
features: Up to 30 HDR photos, interior & exterior

tiers.name: The Straight
tiers.blurb: Day, air and twilight in a single visit — the full first-impression play.

tiers.name: The Flush
tiers.blurb: The full film treatment for listings that deserve a premiere.

alacarte.title: Just need one thing? Deal.
alacarte.intro: Every service stands on its own, or bolts onto any package.

items.name: HDR Listing Photos
items.note: Up to 30 photos · homes to 2,500 sq ft · +$25 per extra 1,000 sq ft

items.name: Aerial Drone Photos
items.note: 8–10 graded aerial shots · $75 as an add-on to any shoot

items.name: Aerial Video Flyover
items.note: Graded drone footage of the property and surroundings

items.name: Vertical Social Reel
items.note: 15–30s cut for Instagram / TikTok · $75 as an add-on

alacarte.finePrint: Travel included within 30 miles of Kerrville — Fredericksburg, Comfort, Ingram, Center Point and Bandera. Farther out? Ask — we love a drive through the Hill Country.

cta.title: Your next listing deserves the winning hand.
cta.copy: Send the address and your target list date — we'll confirm the shoot, chase the light and have photos back before your first showing.
